naga.name: Naga

findings: 1.175 HOT cause: shield-gated buffs (S1 core-dmg 85.17, burst casterAtk 31.02) gated by a MODE defaulting to 'with shielder' -> fire UNCONDITIONALLY unless comp set no-shielder (opposite of kit). Fix: {kind:shielded} event gate (primitive exists). F4 S2 heal in unmodeled violates hard rule 2 (crown consumer). Backfilled dropped Pierce line

naga.evidence: SG falloff + "with shielder" mode calibration; run C 1.06

skill1: Activates after landing 12 normal attack(s). Affects all allies. Restores 14.57% of Cover's Max HP.
skill2: Activates after landing 5 normal attack(s). Affects 2 ally unit(s) with the lowest HP percentage. Recovers 9.58% of the skill user's final Max HP as HP.
burst: Affects self. Gains Pierce for 10 sec.
